title: GLR parser engine: stack, parse loop, and error recovery
description:
Implement the core GLR parsing engine that can parse from scratch (no incremental reuse yet).

This is the largest and most complex task. It includes the Graph-Structured Stack, the main parse loop with shift/reduce/accept, and error recovery.

Deliverables:
- stack.go: Graph-Structured Stack (GSS) with StackNode (state, links[8], position, errorCost, nodeCount, dynamicPrecedence), StackLink (node, subtree, isPending). Operations: push, pop (fan out across merged links, bounded by MAX_ITERATOR_COUNT=64), split (fork version), merge (combine equivalent versions), pause/resume (error recovery), halt (discard version). Use sync.Pool or manual free-list for StackNode. Replace C callback pattern in stack_iter with direct loop + enum return.
- parser.go: Parser struct (language, lexer, stack, reusableNode, oldTree, finishedTree, tokenCache). Main parse loop (ts_parser__advance equivalent). Shift, reduce, accept actions. Token caching. context.Context integration for cancellation (check ctx.Done() in main loop).
- Error recovery: handle_error, recover, do_all_potential_reductions, condense_stack. Error cost constants (ERROR_COST_PER_RECOVERY=500, etc.). MAX_VERSION_COUNT=6, MAX_COST_DIFFERENCE=1800.
- tree.go: Tree struct (root, language, includedRanges). Node value type (context [4]uint32, id, tree pointer). Node accessors: Type, Symbol, StartByte, EndByte, StartPoint, EndPoint, ChildCount, NamedChildCount, Child, NamedChild, ChildByFieldName, Parent, NextSibling, PrevSibling, String (S-expression).
- tree_cursor.go: TreeCursor with stack-based traversal. TreeCursorEntry (subtree, position, childIndex, structuralChildIndex, descendantIndex). GotoFirstChild, GotoNextSibling, GotoParent, CurrentNode.
- subtree.go additions: internal node creation (ts_subtree_new_node), ts_subtree_summarize_children (compute visibleChildCount, namedChildCount, visibleDescendantCount, firstLeaf, repeatDepth, etc).

Tests:
- Parse JSON files, verify S-expression output matches C tree-sitter
- Test error recovery on malformed JSON
- Stack operations: push, pop with multiple paths, version merging, version halting
- TreeCursor traversal correctness
- Node accessor correctness (positions, child navigation, field names)
- Parse with context cancellation

Reference: docs/design.md §6, §9 Phase 3, C source: parser.c, stack.c, node.c, tree_cursor.c, tree.c
